blindness_note: Hidden method identity: the evaluator is not shown M1/M3, model, temperature, prompt, source filename, or generation pipeline. Visible directional role: Reference Concept versus Transformation Candidate.

displayed_cards.role_instruction: Use this concept only as the reference point for judging preservation, retention, MVP improvement, overclaim removal, and semantic drift.

candidate.title: Cloud Scribes
candidate.target_user: Visual artists seeking cooperative abstract outlet
candidate.problem_or_desire: Digital art being solitary by design
candidate.core_concept: A painting tool that forces cooperative constraint, where one user can only define the line curvature while the other holds exclusive rights to color saturation selection.
candidate.proposed_approach: Sync-based 'Duel Painting' rounds where a single artifact cannot progress unless both parties contribute concurrently over 60 seconds.
candidate.prototype_scope: Two-user concurrent drawing interface demonstrating synchronization logic for one shared layer.

displayed_cards.role_instruction: Assess how this candidate changes, preserves, narrows, or operationalizes the Reference Concept. Do not assume this transformation is automatically better.

candidate.title: Cloud Scribes
candidate.target_user: Visual artists seeking cooperative abstract outlet
candidate.problem_or_desire: Digital art being solitary by design
candidate.core_concept: Cooperative drawing tool with forced constraints.
candidate.proposed_approach: A drawing app where two users must coordinate to create a single image, with one controlling line and the other controlling color.
candidate.prototype_scope: A two-user concurrent drawing interface demonstrating basic synchronization logic for one shared layer. | Implement basic drawing canvas; Build simple networking for two-user sync; Define line and color control roles

candidate.title: Remote Cultural Consultant Tooling
candidate.problem_or_desire: Churn due to poor communication onboarding in distributed digital agencies
candidate.core_concept: Interactive, asynchronous onboarding playbooks for remote teams.
candidate.proposed_approach: A service providing modular, interactive PDF/Notion playbooks for remote team onboarding.
candidate.prototype_scope: Three modular playbooks delivered as interactive documents. | Design 3 modular playbooks.; Format as interactive documents.; Test with 3 remote startups.; Gather feedback on usability.

candidate.title: Vertical Hyper-Growth Greens Box
candidate.target_user: Small households living without access to light
candidate.problem_or_desire: Fresh, raw herbs losing structural viability within days of shop delivery
candidate.core_concept: Live subscription of micro-planters moved directly from industrial shelf to kitchen counter
candidate.proposed_approach: Retail unit which features replaceable harvest substrate cassettes specifically designed for light-starved indoor kitchens
candidate.prototype_scope: Installation of 20 live harvesting modules into resident fridges testing herb survival across fifteen separate kitchens

candidate.title: Vertical Hyper-Growth Greens Box
candidate.target_user: Small households living without access to light
candidate.problem_or_desire: Fresh, raw herbs losing structural viability within days of shop delivery
candidate.core_concept: Live, harvestable herbs in the kitchen.

candidate.title: Coffee Rental & Skill Development Platform
candidate.problem_or_desire: High barrier to entry regarding technical manual pour-over hardware acquisition costs
candidate.core_concept: Trial-based access to premium coffee brewing equipment with guided technique support.
candidate.proposed_approach: A rental service for manual brewing equipment (e.g., V60, Chemex) paired with a digital guide or video tutorial for the user.
candidate.prototype_scope: A 30-day rental program for 5 users using 2 types of manual brewing rigs. | Acquire 5 sets of manual brewing equipment.; Create a simple PDF/video guide for each rig.; Run a 30-day pilot with 5 local users.

candidate.title: Professional Field Brew Station Repair Service
candidate.problem_or_desire: Machine downtime disproportionately impacting revenue during slow maintenance call-outs from established vendors
candidate.core_concept: Rapid-response modular machine heart swaps and standardized component library to reduce technical failure periods
candidate.proposed_approach: Aggregator of independent master electricians trained in industry equipment, utilizing modular chassis exchange rather than deep in-store diagnostics
candidate.prototype_scope: Testing speed-to-solution with five broken commercial devices by delivering serviced, reconditioned replacement module parts

candidate.title: Professional Field Brew Station Repair Service
candidate.problem_or_desire: Machine downtime disproportionately impacting revenue during slow maintenance call-outs from established vendors
candidate.core_concept: Rapid-response repair service using modular swaps to minimize downtime.
candidate.proposed_approach: A repair service that stocks common replacement parts for popular machines to offer faster turnaround times than traditional vendors.
candidate.prototype_scope: A pilot repair service for 5 local cafes focusing on one common machine brand. | Identify 5 cafes using the same machine brand.; Stock common parts for that brand.; Offer a 24-hour repair guarantee for those cafes.

candidate.title: Personalized Traceability Identity (TI)
candidate.problem_or_desire: Lack of granular detail connecting payment to specific farmer/crop outcomes in mainstream coffee service channels
candidate.core_concept: Connecting consumer spend directly to specific agricultural outcomes or beneficiaries.
candidate.proposed_approach: A loyalty program where points can be redeemed as direct donations to a specific agricultural school or project associated with the coffee origin.
candidate.prototype_scope: A manual dashboard tracking customer points and corresponding donations to a partner agricultural project. | Partner with one agricultural project.; Set up a manual tracking system for 10 customers.; Execute one donation cycle.

candidate.title: Echo Archive

candidate.problem_or_desire: Disconnected storytelling platforms for regional historical facts

candidate.title: Event Schedule Peacekeeper
candidate.target_user: Chief of Staff to growing leadership teams
candidate.problem_or_desire: Managing individual goal priorities within restricted master organizational capacity plans.
candidate.core_concept: Constraint-based scheduling that prioritizes project milestones over availability.
candidate.proposed_approach: A tool that allows users to define 'critical blocks' and suggests rescheduling based on project milestones.
candidate.prototype_scope: A calendar plugin that lets users tag meetings as 'milestone-critical' and suggests moving non-critical meetings if conflicts arise. | Define milestone-critical tags; Build calendar API integration; Implement conflict detection; Create suggestion engine

displayed_cards.role_instruction: Use this concept only as the reference point for judging preservation, retention, MVP improvement, overclaim removal, and semantic drift.

candidate.title: Event Schedule Peacekeeper
candidate.target_user: Chief of Staff to growing leadership teams
candidate.problem_or_desire: Managing individual goal priorities within restricted master organizational capacity plans.
candidate.core_concept: Constraint-optimization based scheduler prioritizing stated goal achievement rather than empty availability.
candidate.proposed_approach: The agent performs impact analysis of moving one 'critical block' by predicting potential schedule collapse based on historical meeting habits.
candidate.prototype_scope: Plugin interfacing with a public calendar API that suggests reshuffling times based on user-designated project milestones.
